import json
from pathlib import Path
state=json.loads(Path('../state.json').read_text())
print('current_date',state.get('current_date'))
print('questions',len(state.get('questions',[])),'resolution_events',len(state.get('resolution_events',[])),'total_predictions',state.get('total_predictions'))
for ev in state.get('resolution_events', [])[-20:]:
    ag=ev.get('agents',{}).get('minimalHarness_gpt-55_001',{})
    print('\\n',ev.get('sim_date'),ev.get('qid'),ev.get('ground_truth'))
    print(ev.get('title'))
    print('agent',{k:ag.get(k) for k in ['brier','best_outcome','best_prob','truth_prob','is_accurate','tw_peer']})
PY"

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
pd.set_option('display.max_colwidth',170)
df=pd.read_csv('market.csv')
act=df[~df.is_resolved].copy(); act['rd']=pd.to_datetime(act.resolution_date, errors='coerce')
print('rows',len(df),'active',len(act),'resolved',df.is_resolved.sum(),'empty aggregate',act.market_aggregate.isna().sum())
cols=['qid','resolution_date','title','market_aggregate','num_predictions','options']
print('\\nsoon active:')
print(act.sort_values(['rd','qid'])[cols].head(65).to_string(index=False))
print('\\nresolved tail:')
print(df[df.is_resolved].tail(18)[['qid','resolution_date','title','ground_truth','market_aggregate','num_predictions']].to_string(index=False, max_colwidth=150))
PY"

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
pd.set_option('display.max_colwidth',170)
df=pd.read_csv('market.csv')
act=df[~df.is_resolved].copy(); act['rd']=pd.to_datetime(act.resolution_date, errors='coerce')
print('rows',len(df),'active',len(act),'resolved',df.is_resolved.sum(),'empty aggregate',act.market_aggregate.isna().sum())
cols=['qid','resolution_date','title','market_aggregate','num_predictions','options']
print('\\nsoon active:')
print(act.sort_values(['rd','qid'])[cols].head(65).to_string(index=False))
print('\\nresolved tail:')
print(df[df.is_resolved].tail(18)[['qid','resolution_date','title','ground_truth','market_aggregate','num_predictions']].to_string(index=False, max_colwidth=150))
PY"

blocks.text: March 6 resolved well: Balendra Shah and Iran were correct, and Tyre district had useful tail mass. I’m scanning March 6 articles now for the Mar 7-11 questions, especially Beirut/Oslo, Sri Lanka coach, Australia missiles, airline outlook, Ukraine, Iraqi militia, sports, and cyberattack markets.

/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json
p='articles/2026/03/06/articles.jsonl'
groups={
'Q276_beirut_hotel':['hotel room','Raouche','Manara','Ain el-Mreisseh','Ramlet al-Baida','Minet el-Hosn','Lebanese health'],
'Q338_oslo':['Oslo','embassy','bombing','blast','Norwegian police','Israeli Embassy','Russian Embassy'],
'Q578_beirut_apartment':['apartment','kills at least four','Dahiyeh','Haret Hreik','Ghobeiry','Burj al-Barajneh','central Beirut'],
'Q179_srilanka':['Sri Lanka','coach','Jayasuriya','Jayawardene','Sangakkara','Atapattu','Naveed Nawaz'],
'Q271_australia':['Australia','missiles','receive missiles','prime minister','Ukraine'],
'Q304_airline':['financial outlook','fuel costs','airline','Qantas','Lufthansa','Air France','IAG','Delta'],
'Q309_ukraine':['almost entirely retaken','counteroffensive','major-general','Kherson','Zaporizhzhia','Sumy','Kharkiv'],
'Q399_wc':['World Cup','Iran','move','group-stage','Canada','Mexico','FIFA'],
'Q605_iraq_group':['four members','12 injured','northern Iraq','Kataib','Kataeb','Nujaba','Asaib','blames on the United States'],
'Q932_afc_china':['AFC Women','China','quarterfinal','Japan','South Korea','Australia'],
'Q935_liverpool_goal':['Liverpool','only goal','first leg','Champions League','Darwin Nunez','Mohamed Salah'],
'Q211_ipl':['Royal Challengers Bengaluru','IPL','Indian Premier League','Chennai Super Kings','Mumbai Indians'],
'Q425_psg':['Paris St Germain','Chelsea','substitute','two goals','Goncalo Ramos','Bradley Barcola'],
'Q559_cyber':['medical-device','cyberattack','Predatory Sparrow','Anonymous','hacking persona'],
'Q807_rm_city':['Real Madrid','Manchester City','hat-trick','Rodrygo','Bellingham','Mbappe'],
'Q828_central_beirut':['central Beirut','apartment','Israeli media','Hezbollah','Al Mayadeen','Amal'],
'Q488_synagogue':['Detroit','synagogue','active shooter','Temple Israel','Adat Shalom'],
'Q742_aircraft':['western Iraq','CENTCOM','aircraft model','MQ-9','F-15E','lost'],
}
for name,keys in groups.items():
    print('\\n###',name)
    n=0
    for i,line in enumerate(open(p,encoding='utf-8'),1):
        try:a=json.loads(line)
        except: continue
        title=a.get('title') or ''; content=a.get('content') or ''
        text=title+'\\n'+content
        low=text.lower()
        if any(k.lower() in low for k in keys):
            n+=1
            print('\\nLINE',i,'TITLE:',title)
            print('SOURCE',a.get('source'),'DATE',a.get('date_publish'))
            for key in keys:
                j=low.find(key.lower())
                if j"'!=-1:
                    print('"'SNIP',key,':',text[max(0,j-180):j+450].replace('\\n',' ')[:800])
                    break
            if n>=8: break
    if not n: print('none')
PY"

blocks.content:
LINE 13 TITLE: Israel Is Using Its Genocidal Gaza Playbook on Iran
SOURCE www.thenation.com DATE 2026-03-06
SNIP bombing : in 2025 that the “residents of Tehran will pay the price, and soon.” As massive bombardments rained down on the capital last June, Katz, who is still in charge of executing carpet bombings of Tehran in this war, bragged bluntly: “Tehran is burning.” That ethos remains in the current war, as was proven when a US-Israeli strike targeted an elementary school in the town of Iran. At least 168 people, many of them young girls, were killed in scenes hauntingly reminiscent of the massacres of children and the destruction of educational institutions in Gaza.

LINE 70 TITLE: Is US pressing Sri Lanka not to repatriate Iranian crew from sunk ship
SOURCE www.bairdmaritime.com DATE 2026-03-06
SNIP embassy : 's widening geographic scope. The internal state department cable, which was dated March 6 and has not been previously reported, said Jayne Howell, the charge d'affaires at the US embassy in Colombo, had emphasized to Sri Lanka's government that neither the Booshehr crew nor the 32 Dena survivors should be repatriated to Iran. It said, "Sri Lankan authorities should minimize Iranian attempts to use the detainees for propaganda." The state department did not immediately respond to a request for comment. Representatives for Dissanayake's office and Sri Lanka's foreign ministry were not immediately available for comment. The 

LINE 78 TITLE: After a week of war, Trump demands Iran's unconditional surrender
SOURCE www.bairdmaritime.com DATE 2026-03-06
SNIP bombing : we are committed to lasting peace in the region, but we have not the slightest hesitation in defending the dignity and authority of our country," he added. Israel has extended its bombing to Lebanon to root out Hezbollah, the Shi'ite militia allied to Iran that has been a dominant faction in Lebanese politics since the 1980s. Hezbollah fired on Israel this week to avenge the death of Khamenei. "We’re sleeping here in the streets - some in cars, some on the street, some on the beach,” said Jamal Seifeddin, 43, who fled Beirut’s southern suburbs and spent the night on the streets in the capital’s downtown district. "No one e

LINE 83 TITLE: Russia providing Iran intelligence to target US force
SOURCE www.bairdmaritime.com DATE 2026-03-05
SNIP embassy : ng exports battered in recent years by sanctions linked to its war in Ukraine. The United States has given Ukraine intelligence information during its war with Russia. The Russian Embassy in Washington and Russia's mission to the United Nations in New York did not immediately respond to requests for comment. (Reporting by Bhargav Acharya in Toronto; Editing by Scott Malone and Alistair Bell)
